lines: Plants need sun and water to grow big and strong, {player}.
Every leaf has a secret! Shall we find one?
I love watching things grow with you, {player}!
no_quest_line: You have a green thumb for sky-plants, {player}!
quest_offer_line: My sky-garden needs some special seeds. Would you help me find them, {player}?
quest_progress_line: Look at that little sprout! You're a great gardener, {player}!
quest_complete_line: Everything is growing so beautifully now. Thank you for your help, {player}.
